description: All functions (bits_to_decimal, half_adder, decimal_to_4bit) return correct outputs for all input combinations
Does not use Python keywords 'and', 'or', 'not', 'if'; does not use the + operator
half_adder is built from XOR and AND gate functions, not shortcut operators
Correct use of (sum, carry) return pattern in half_adder and (b3, b2, b1, b0) in decimal_to_4bit
